Index.title: Hello, I'm Killian!
Index.description: After a four-year career in full-stack web development, I’ve decided to follow my true calling: making games. I’ve always been fascinated by how things work "under the hood", experimenting with game architectures or the constraints of GPUs and consoles. This site is a collection of those experiments.

Newsletter.title: Stay up to date
Newsletter.description: Get notified when I publish something new, and unsubscribe at any time.

iut1.company: Professional Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science

iut2.company: Associate Degree in Multimedia & Web Dev

Articles.title: Sharing what I find out while building and breaking things
Articles.description: When I’m experimenting with code, I often stumble upon things that are just too interesting not to share. This space is dedicated to those discoveries and the stories behind them. You can also find these articles over on my Medium page.

Projects.title: Some of the projects I have been involved in over the years
Projects.intro: I’ve worked on tons of little projects over the years but these are the ones that I find the most interesting to share. Most are game related, but some are simply hobbies.
